Game: The Itchy & Scratchy Game 1995-03-01T00:00:00-08:00 They fight, and bite, they fight and bite and fight. Get ready as Itchy & Scratchy slice, dice, crash and bash their way into your home. This cat's gonna need more than nine lives to survive bazookas, grenades, chain saws and flame throwers. There's more than one way to skin a cat.
